[2021-02-18 17:55] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Venge > Iceblade > Proto Doom > Venge?
[2021-02-18 17:55] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Can Doom make Venge actually be Asteri Venge?
[2021-02-18 17:56] silentslayers: Perhaps. The actual game turned into ￼asteris￼
[2021-02-18 17:56] silentslayers: I was unsure if you can get Proto but it was a good flex against his threat of an early asteri and if he doesn’t build it I just get ferritins. Worked out really well￼
[2021-02-18 17:57] silentslayers: Usually not much to fear against blades if you have a good green blue plan￼
[2021-02-18 17:57] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Yea I really like Animus
[2021-02-18 17:57] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Ferritin, early Proto and Bpacts are all cool even if you are BP
[2021-02-18 17:57] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Considering there is Iceblade to sink Ferritin
[2021-02-18 17:58] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Update your keyboard, it's stuck in ASCII land
[2021-02-18 17:58] silentslayers: Haha it is because of an iPhone bug when you use speech dictation￼
[2021-02-18 17:58] silentslayers: I use it to not type too much. I have RSI on my hands
[2021-02-18 17:59] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Oof sorry to hear :(
[2021-02-18 18:00] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Yea Doom is just too OP
[2021-02-18 18:00] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): So clearly it's Doom BP in hindsight
[2021-02-18 18:00] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): You clicked your Asteris
[2021-02-18 18:00] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Do you think FF Protos was better than transitioning?
[2021-02-18 18:00] silentslayers: Well that’s the part I’m not sure about. After seeing the game I’m definitely leaning more towards not BP
[2021-02-18 18:01] silentslayers: But perhaps the opponents can play a really tight BP and force you to transition
[2021-02-18 18:01] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): I guess yea you should keep protoing as long as possible
[2021-02-18 18:01] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Cos afterwards you're down the Animus investment
[2021-02-18 18:02] silentslayers: Yeah exactly. When I bought that I’m basically saying I want to buy multiple Proto’s or it was a bad animus￼
[2021-02-18 18:02] silentslayers: But I definitely felt forced to buy a absorber because he threatened to be aggressive￼
[2021-02-18 18:02] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Yea really interesting Asteri Doom soak interaction
[2021-02-18 18:03] silentslayers: It felt￼ like one of those sets where I wasn’t sure at first how complicated the options were when the set first pops up
[2021-02-18 18:03] silentslayers: But it boiled down into something that made sense￼
[2021-02-18 18:04] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): I am saving this replay
[2021-02-18 18:04] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): I love how you just play standard without blue lol
[2021-02-18 18:04] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Cos you got soak in Doom and Asteri, and Proto as "absorb/soak"
[2021-02-18 18:05] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Is there ever a world where you 2nd animus
[2021-02-18 18:05] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): To unlock blood pact Proto
[2021-02-18 18:05] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): and not go 4th condu
[2021-02-18 18:06] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Cos less forcefields needed
[2021-02-18 18:07] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): But prolly 2nd Asteri just too good
[2021-02-18 18:07] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): In the position you were in already
[2021-02-18 18:07] masn6811 (Masne98888): the best absorber in the set is clearly proto
[2021-02-18 18:08] masn6811 (Masne98888): and i dont think iceblade is good enough in this set
[2021-02-18 18:08] masn6811 (Masne98888): because the best attacker is clearly asteri
[2021-02-18 18:09] masn6811 (Masne98888): i would go for a 3 engi econ line, and go for an asteri/proto build
[2021-02-18 18:09] masn6811 (Masne98888): likely never buying a forge
[2021-02-18 18:09] masn6811 (Masne98888): the thing is when the best absorb in a set is proto, venge bp is a hard sell
[2021-02-18 18:10] masn6811 (Masne98888): because the point of venge bp is to make your opponent spend their attacking tech (eg. red) inefficiently because red sucks at defending
[2021-02-18 18:10] masn6811 (Masne98888): but both reds can just go to proto so theres no wastage
[2021-02-18 18:11] masn6811 (Masne98888): and besides, this is vegan venge
[2021-02-18 18:11] masn6811 (Masne98888): imagine going venge bp when theres no green sink and the venge built in one cost 2hp :OMEGALUL:
[2021-02-18 18:11] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): So Iceblade is too weak vs the Proto/Asteri combo?
[2021-02-18 18:11] masn6811 (Masne98888): proto isnt great against blades
[2021-02-18 18:12] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Blades do many cool things
[2021-02-18 18:12] masn6811 (Masne98888): but the leading tech is green since you dont want red until you need absorb
[2021-02-18 18:12] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Freeze all the cool stuff
[2021-02-18 18:12] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Like Dooms, Asteris, Protos

[2021-09-12 02:50] silentslayers: Either a smorcus opening (if they go Apollo and snipe it, that's ok), or float 4 like you did into BBD into drake followed by lanceteeth as P2

Drake Tooth opening

[P2] 1. DD 2. DD (float 4) 3. BBD 4. Buy Drake

Smorcus opening (this Animus opening is also known as fastimus)

[P2] 1. DD 2. DA 3. Smorcus+DD
[2021-09-12 02:53] silentslayers: And AFAIK you were winning for most of the game
[2021-09-12 02:56] silentslayers: The biggest accelerators of this set that makes it very fast are Drake, Lancetooth, and Smorcus
[2021-09-12 02:56] silentslayers: These are quite aggressive
[2021-09-12 02:56] silentslayers: Iceblade can be quite fast too, but here I think Iceblade are quite beatable and they're only good typically when all-inning and buying 2 at a time, so I didn't mention them. Smorcus sellling your red so you can go blue easily handles the blades. And also as you saw the blue stuff (drake) was quite powerful vs the blades
[2021-09-12 02:57] silentslayers: In general odd numbered health defenders are strong versus iceblades, so walls are really what you need versus them
[2021-09-12 02:58] silentslayers: Nivos can be aggressive, but theyre only freezing walls at best here (or occasionally lancetooth), and the thing is you dont want green almost ever this set until maybe the *very* end for forcefields, so they dont impact the fastness of the set much
[2021-09-12 02:59] silentslayers: Apollo does have support here because drake can sell your excess blue, and you can snipe smorcus and walls, however, this set is quite fast, so I don't expect Apollo to be viable
